SEARCH

FormCoach API Documentation

FormCoach — AI-Powered Exercise Form Coach

FormCoach is a Java/JavaFX desktop application that uses computer-vision pose estimation to give real-time feedback on exercise technique. A Python MediaPipe server analyses webcam frames and streams 33-point skeleton landmarks back to the Java frontend, which scores form quality and counts repetitions for each supported exercise.

Supported Exercises

  • Push-ups — upper-body pushing movement
  • Sit-ups — core flexion movement
  • Squats — lower-body compound movement

Package Overview

PackageResponsibility
com.formcoach Application entry point (Main) and the central navigation hub (Navigator) that wires all screens together.
com.formcoach.auth User authentication: login, registration, PBKDF2 password hashing, SQLite persistence, and the in-memory AuthSession singleton.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.camera
 Webcam capture and display via the Sarxos WebcamCapture library.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.camera.CameraView
grabs frames and exposes a landmark callback used by the pose pipeline.
com.formcoach.chatbot Floating AI chat assistant powered by the Google Gemini API. Provides exercise and form advice within the app.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.poseanalysis
 Core form-scoring engine.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.PoseScorer.PoseScorer
computes 7 joint angles from raw landmarks and finds the best-matching reference pose from the CSV dataset (
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.PoseReference.PoseReference
).
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.repcount
 Repetition counting via a two-phase angle-threshold state machine (
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.repcount.RepetitionCounter
). Works for Push-ups, Squats, and Sit-ups without additional configuration.
com.formcoach.textoutputgen Converts raw pose-comparison data into human-readable feedback strings and a 0–10 form score (textoutputgen).
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.runexercise
 Live exercise session screen. Orchestrates the camera, pose scorer, rep counter, and feedback text area in a single JavaFX view.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.selection
 Paginated exercise-selection screen where users browse and choose an exercise before entering the tutorial or live session.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.videomodal
 Pre-session tutorial video player.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.videomodal.VideoResolver
maps exercise names to bundled MP4 files;
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.videomodal.ExerciseVideoView
renders the playback UI.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.historypage
 Workout history screen displaying past session records.
com.formcoach.profile User profile screen for viewing and updating account details.
invalid reference 
com.formcoach.landingpage
 Marketing / hero landing page shown on first launch.
kaggle Kaggle dataset integration. Downloads and caches the exercise CSV on first run; provides ExerciseDataset records to other parts of the app.

Architecture

  Main (JavaFX Application)
    +-- Navigator                   <- single hub, swaps scenes on the Stage
         +-- landingpage
         +-- AuthPage               <- login / register
         +-- ExerciseSelectionPage  <- browse exercises
         +-- ExerciseVideoView      <- tutorial video preview
         \-- runexercise            <- live session
              +-- CameraView        <- webcam + PoseDetector bridge
              +-- PoseScorer        <- angle computation + reference matching
              +-- RepetitionCounter <- state-machine rep counting
              \-- textoutputgen     <- form feedback text + score

Python Pose Server

invalid reference 
com.formcoach.PoseDetector.PoseDetector
connects to a local Python process (scripts/main.py) over a length-prefixed TCP socket on port 5001. JPEG frames are sent to Python; MediaPipe landmark JSON is returned. Main starts and stops the server automatically alongside the JavaFX lifecycle.

Modules
Module
Description
com.formcoach
FormCoach application module.

FormCoach — CAB302 Project
